description_long: This is a compact urban gas station featuring a rectangular building with a flat roof and a large canopy extending over the fueling area. The canopy is supported by several columns and displays a prominent 'FUEL' sign in yellow script, while a large billboard advertising hot dogs stands on a grassy patch to the side. Two vehicles, one red and one blue, are parked under the canopy and beside the building, respectively. The station includes a small convenience store with a glass entrance door and a window displaying a hot dog poster. The exterior is primarily black and gray, with green landscaping elements and metallic railings outlining the perimeter. No visible fuel pumps or price display boards are present, but the overall design is modern and functional, suitable for a city street or roadside location.
description: A modern, compact gas station with a flat-roofed building, large canopy, bold signage, and two parked vehicles, surrounded by green landscaping and metallic railings.
description_view_0: Top-down angle showing the flat canopy, rooftop HVAC unit, billboard, and a red vehicle parked under the canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the canopy, supporting columns, and grassy area with minimal visible detail of the vehicles.
description_view_2: Frontal view with clear visibility of the 'FUEL' sign, blue vehicle, convenience store entrance, and hot dog billboard.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the blue vehicle, back of the building, and the edge of the canopy with rooftop details.
attribute_canopy_structure: Large rectangular canopy with rounded corners, supported by multiple slim columns, constructed from metal and concrete, colored black and gray, with a yellow 'FUEL' sign attached to the front edge. No visible lighting fixtures.
attribute_station_signage: A large billboard on the left side advertises 'HOT DOG' with a hot dog image, featuring a yellow and white color scheme. The canopy displays a yellow 'FUEL' sign in script. A poster with a hot dog is visible in the convenience store window. No other signage is visible.
attribute_convenience_store_entrance: Located at the front of the building, the entrance features a single glass door with a black frame, adjacent to a large window displaying a hot dog poster. The entrance is accessible from the fueling area and has no visible branding above the door.
